offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inefficient billing causes cash flow gaps. We provide dunning notifications instead of manual tracking and follow-ups via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient management of recurring billing and dunning processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts and comments on workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice creation and dunning templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
